description: R.A.A.P.Jayasinghe and K.M.Weerasinghe Vs. Assistant Commissioner of Cooperative Development and Six Others R.A.A.P.Jayasinghe and K.M.Weerasinghe Vs. Assistant Commissioner of Cooperative Development and Six Others View More before Hon. K. M. S. Dissanayake, J.
parties: R.A.A.P.Jayasinghe and K.M.Weerasinghe Vs. Assistant Commissioner of Cooperative Development and Six Others R.A.A.P.Jayasinghe and K.M.Weerasinghe Vs. Assistant Commissioner of Cooperative Development and Six Others View More
judgement_by: Hon. K. M. S. Dissanayake, J.
keywords: Having failed to exercise the right of appeal to the Supreme Court to be read with sections 9(a) and 10 of the Act and Articles 154P(3)(b) and 138 of the Constitution, could the Petitioner invoke the extra-ordinary revisionary jurisdiction of this Court vested in it under Article 138 of the Constitution to revise and set aside an order made by a High Court of the Province, to be read with sections 4,5 and 6 of the High Court of the Provinces (Special Provisions) Act, No. 19 of 1990 and Articles 154P(3)(b) and 138 of the Constitution and to be read with sections 9(a) and 10 of the High Court of the Provinces (Special Provisions) Act, No. 19 of 1990.
legistation: Article 138, Article 154P(3)(b) of the Constitution of the Democratic Socialist Republic of Sri Lanka, Sections 3, 9(a) and 10 of the High Court of the Provinces (Special Provisions) Act, No. 19 of 1990.
